<h1 align="center">Docker Installation Wizard</h1>

<p align="center">
Interactive Docker Installer for Ubuntu, Debian and Enterprise Linux Distributions.
</p>

<p align="center">

![Debian](https://img.shields.io/badge/Debian-Supported-red)
![Docker](https://img.shields.io/badge/Docker-Latest-blue)
![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-green)

</p>

---

## 🚀 Quick Start

Clone Repository

```bash
git clone https://github.com/alfannite/docker.git
cd docker
```

---

## 📦 Debian

Run Installer

```bash
cd debian
chmod +x install.sh
sudo ./install.sh
```

Remove Docker

```bash
cd debian
chmod +x uninstall.sh
sudo ./uninstall.sh
```

---

## 📖 Features

* Interactive Installation Wizard
* Official Docker Repository
* Docker Compose Plugin
* Docker Buildx Plugin
* Docker Group Management
* Installation Verification
* Clean Uninstall Mode
* Complete Uninstall Mode

---

## 🛠 Supported Operating Systems

| Distribution  | Status |
| ------------- | ------ |
| Ubuntu 22.04  |   🚧  |
| Ubuntu 24.04  |   🚧  |
| Debian        |   ✅  |
| Rocky Linux 9 |   🚧  |
| AlmaLinux 9   |   🚧  |
| RHEL 9        |   🚧  |
